recipe.title: Creamy Chicken Orzo
ingredients: 3 large boneless skinless chicken breasts (about 2½ lb)
3 large boneless skinless chicken breasts (about 2½ lb)
1 tsp salt, plus more to taste
steps: Season chicken with salt, pepper, and paprika.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Sear chicken 3–4 minutes per side until cooked through. Remove and slice.
In the same pan, melt butter. Sauté onion until soft, about 4 minutes. Add garlic, cook 1 minute.
Stir in orzo and toast 1 minute.
Add broth and water. Simmer 10–12 minutes, stirring occasionally, until orzo is tender.
Stir in cream cheese, heavy cream, Parmesan, parsley, salt, and pepper.
Return sliced chicken to pan. Serve warm.
